completed: Bug 1: Fixed isDue flag logic in Status.jsx
Bug 2: Fixed AO role access in Status.jsx
Bug 3 & 6: Fixed mentor assignment race conditions by moving sync after commit
Bug 4: SSE reliability improvements (client-side polling + server-side named events)
Bug 5: Immediate student status cache invalidation after approvals
Bug 10: Fixed student Name/RollNo sync — created syncStudentUpdate and integrated into updateStudent
System Integrity: Moved all class-level and student-level sync calls after commitSafeTransaction in controllers to eliminate race conditions

decisions.context: Sync calls were executing before transactions committed
decisions.decision: Moved all sync calls in studentController and classController to AFTER commitSafeTransaction
decisions.trade_offs: Small window where DB is updated but batch sync hasn't run yet. However, this is safer as it guarantees sync functions read the correct committed data.
